login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back. Your books are still running.
login.disabled: Your account has been disabled. Contact <support>support</support>.
login.unverified: Please verify your email before logging in. We sent a link to {{email}}.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Free 7-day trial. No card required.
register.emailTaken: This email is already registered. <signin>Sign in instead</signin>

marketing.heading: Your thresholds. Your tickers. Sub-second.
marketing.body: Define custom classification rules per ticker and watch significant levels surface the moment they form.

loginMarketing.heading: Every level that matters, in real time.
loginMarketing.body: Live order books for 500+ Binance spot and futures tickers, classified by your rules, streamed in under a second.

confirm.title: Confirm your email
confirm.body:
You're one click away. Confirm to activate
your account and start screening.

success.title: Email confirmed
success.body:
Your account is verified.
Sign in to start screening.

invalid.title: This link is invalid or has expired
invalid.body: Verification links last 24 hours and work once. Enter your email and we'll send a fresh one.
invalid.captionDefault: if an unverified account exists, a link will be sent

checkInbox.title: Check your inbox

{{email}}
The link is valid for 24 hours.
